issues.detail: M-008 report feature names have 'Bao cao Bao cao' duplication pattern (e.g., 'Bao cao Bao cao tang giam tai san', 'Bao cao Bao cao ke khai'). This is a cosmetic extraction artifact where the report template prefix was prepended to the report name. It does not affect functionality but should be cleaned for readability.
issues.suggested-fix: Rename to 'Bao cao tang giam tai san', 'Bao cao ke khai, tinh hinh quan ly TS KCHTGT', etc.

issues.detail: A few feature names contain Unicode encoding artifacts (e.g., 'thuyá»n' instead of 'thuyền', 'trÃ¡nh trÃº bÃ£o' instead of 'tránh trú bão'). These appear in 7 feature names across M-008 and M-009. This is a file encoding issue from the extraction process.
issues.suggested-fix: Run UTF-8 normalization on catalog.json and module data files to fix encoding artifacts.

issues.detail: Entity-to-entity relationship cardinality mappings are limited to 6 simple string entries. raw-extract.md section 7 identifies 19 entity types with counts, and doc-brief.md section 6.1 lists 6 databases with relationships (cang_bien 1:N ben_cang, cang_bien 1:N cau_cang, etc.). A comprehensive 1:N mapping for all 19 KCHT entity types is needed for SDLC scaffolding.
issues.suggested-fix: Create a relationships.json or extend catalog.json with complete entity cardinality mappings (1:1, 1:N) for all 19 KCHT object types.

issues.detail: test-data-hints.md does not exist. This file would provide sample data values for each entity field matching MSSQL types from tech-brief.md. It is expected in the enrichment layer for SDLC readiness.
issues.suggested-fix: Create test-data-hints.md with sample values for each entity field, organized by module.

issues.detail: do_d checklist items api_contract_complete and entity_schema_defined are set to false across all 12 module files. This is expected at Layer 1 (intel extraction phase) — these fields become true after Layer 2 (URD) produces API contracts and entity schemas. Documented as informational.
issues.suggested-fix: No action needed at Layer 1. These will be updated by the designer specialist in Layer 2.
